LAW AND MOTION 301, PLAINTIFF KEITH LUCERO'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS DENIED. DEFENDANT HAS RAISED TRIABLE ISSUE OF MATERIAL FACT AS TO CIRCUMSTANCES OF THE ALTERCATION AND THE AMOUNT OF ANY GIFT HE MAY HAVE MADE TO HIS BROTHER THROUGH HIS DEPOSITION AND DECLARATION AND THE TAYLOR AND DEEHAM DECLARATIONS. PREVAILING PARTY IS TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER PURSUANT TO CCP 437C(G). JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR# 8189

DEFENDANT HAS RAISED TRIABLE ISSUE OF MATERIAL FACT AS TO CIRCUMSTANCES OF THE ALTERCATION AND THE AMOUNT OF ANY GIFT HE MAY HAVE MADE TO HIS BROTHER THROUGH HIS DEPOSITION AND DECLARATION AND THE TAYLOR AND DEEHAM DECLARATIONS.
